{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220139525172EC75AD7078023524"}"},"total":2063},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7496178146203435838","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看！真爽文！收徒后，徒徒努力男主获利，男主每天咸鱼也会修为蹭蹭涨[飞吻]一宗门都是老六，还特别团结，去哪都有老祖护航。统统们也可爱，男主的统子带着一堆小弟统去给男主薅宝物"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745346235,"group_id":"7153631957279050793","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"10年老书虫看书不跳章。bgbl都看但是言情掺腐如喂💩","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4RpH18ABsLRjjzQwkPD6gLAKNK9CrHlFGdHXH1zMnJp","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/21edd91cb47e43a5b488b80b010c7284~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703351&x-signature=rNlwsv44NpgJ%2BmJAxdUiZoGQH8U%3D","user_id":"3016658397182716","user_name":"芋泥兔兔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3016658397182716","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7153631957279050793","book_info":{"abstract":"【收徒+轻松日常+全员老六+不按套路出牌】
陆长之穿越了
竟能选择新的身份
身为赌狗，果断选择随机
结果真是秦始皇摸电线——赢麻了
唯一限定——神级收徒系统，没想到第一个任务竟然是……
【发现其它身怀系统的宿主......侵入中......篡改中.....篡改完成.....拜师任务已发布......】
【恭喜宿主完成收徒，获得新手大礼包、成熟的悟道茶树一棵，新增特性签到系统破解版。】
【恭喜宿主完成第二次收徒，获得圣阶极品阵法万象杀阵，新增特性挂机修行系统尊享版。】
【恭喜宿主拥有三名灵级资质弟子，合成圣级资质弟子，正在路上，请尽快收取。】
【厨神系统使用中......检测到专业对口……升级为大力厨神系统……系统已使用。】
.......
不光弟子有系统，没想到宗门都是苟老六
隐藏实力，叫人，让每一个敌人有以一对十的高光时刻
老六宗门老六峰
没有人能知道
 这一群老六究竟能走到哪一步","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c978428b52738f8e48e5546e4029a35f","author":"小竹子喵喵","author_id":"","book_id":"7153631957279050793","book_name":"弟子有系统，师尊我呀躺成无敌","book_short_name":"赢麻了，我的弟子都有系统","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7153649202906530341","read_count":"29568","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2976846"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1411","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无女主,架空,开局,东方玄幻,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6f5772c7071177042253b88e5b3b21d6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779298792&x-signature=bsASe6P0BftGT8x1UuvgtvZ%2FZIs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2849549374720472","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2051"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220139525172EC75AD7078023524"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读49小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7867,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":175031,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5542},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7276646220440240959","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"追上进度了，是我看过的小说中好的那种。剧情平缓，进展合理，文字轻松诙谐，感觉作者是有一定社会阅历的。
个人觉得稍有几处有点突兀：杀血魔得圣阶武器和修炼资源与之前只有经验的情况有点突兀 ；主角圣人中级修为为了震住黄陂睡觉中突破圣王有点突兀；给了很多文字描述的癞蛤蟆在海族却啥也不是也很突兀。
小说整体上还是不错，个别地方瑕不掩瑜。希望作者保持下去，不要像某些小说为了剧情故意去撑大，后面收不住了导致剧情垮掉。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1694227259,"group_id":"7153631957279050793","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N03xTCAZSTjteUitAy9afzfajUjzPCd01Hqnm3QMyLFD","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1231927006207219","user_name":"用户1679"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1231927006207219","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7153631957279050793","book_info":{"abstract":"【收徒+轻松日常+全员老六+不按套路出牌】

【发现其它身怀系统的宿主......侵入中......篡改中.....篡改完成.....拜师任务已发布......】
【恭喜宿主完成收徒，获得新手大礼包、成熟的悟道茶树一棵，新增特性签到系统破解版。】
【恭喜宿主完成第二次收徒，获得圣阶极品阵法万象杀阵，新增特性挂机修行系统尊享版。】
【恭喜宿主拥有三名灵级资质弟子，合成圣级资质弟子，正在路上，请尽快收取。】
【厨神系统使用中......检测到专业对口……升级为大力厨神系统……系统已使用。】
.......
不光弟子有系统，没想到宗门都是苟老六
隐藏实力，叫人，让每一个敌人有以一对十的高光时刻
